'''Saul Moegantz''' was a criminal [[Gangster/Legends|gangster]]. After his rival [[Clode Rhoden]] tried to kill his [[Rhoden|wife]] in an elaborate insurance scam, she joined forces with Moegantz and planned to sue Clode for divorce and then split Clode's wealth. Moegantz defeated Clode Rhoden at gambling, and claimed as compensation the [[Yorn Skot mining station]].

{{Char-stub}}
